name: create_debug_core
short_description: Create a new Integrated Logic Analyzer debug core
full_help:
create_debug_core

Description: 
Create a new Integrated Logic Analyzer debug core

Syntax: 
create_debug_core  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name> <type>

Returns: 
new debug_core object

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Name of the new debug core instance
  <type>      Type of the new debug core

Categories: 
Debug, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
